meta.title: Baara - Evidence-backed shortlist in 7 days for Go / Infra
meta.description: Scorecards + short work samples + explainable decision memos. Cut 30-50% of unnecessary interviews—without lowering the bar.

hero.badge: EU hosting • Audit trail • Human oversight • Proof-first
hero.title: Evidence-backed shortlist in 7 days for Go / Infra hiring.
hero.subtitle: Scorecards + short work samples + explainable decision memos. Cut 30–50% of unnecessary interviews—without lowering the bar.

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Infra hiring can't be solved with resumes.

items.text: Resume noise doesn't predict production ownership
Interviews are inconsistent and hard to compare
Bad hires are expensive (incidents, delays, churn)
Decisions are difficult to justify and improve

solution.label: The solution
solution.title: Baara Proof is a decision OS for evidence-based hiring.
solution.description: A system that structures your hiring decisions with rigor and transparency.

pillars.title: Scorecards + calibrated rubrics
pillars.description: Same grid, same criteria, comparable scores

pillars.title: Proof loop
pillars.description: Short work sample → structured interviews → decision memo

steps.title: Outcome Brief (20 min)
steps.description: You describe success. Baara structures it, detects ambiguities, proposes clear scope.

steps.title: Scorecard (10 min)
steps.description: Dimensions + weights + rubrics + interview questions. Everything is editable.

steps.title: Short work sample (≤ 60 min total)
steps.description: Debug/perf + async design. Chunkable. Proportionate. No long take-home.

steps.title: Interview kit + structured notes
steps.description: Each interviewer has a kit. Notes follow the scorecard (no more "impressions").

steps.title: Decision memo (auto + editable)
steps.description: Evidence cited, counter-signals, risks + mitigation, 30-day plan.

aiNative.label: AI-native
aiNative.title: AI orchestrates the workflow; humans make final decisions.

features.text: Generates scorecards, kits and rubrics from your outcomes
Proposes the minimum evidence needed to decide (next best evidence)
Highlights inconsistencies and areas of uncertainty
Produces explainable decision memo + audit trail

results.label: Pilot targets
results.title: KPIs we measure during the pilot.
results.subtitle: These are the measurable objectives tracked before/after each pilot.

metrics.label: Time-to-shortlist
metrics.description: Target: from role opening to evidence-backed shortlist

metrics.label: Interviews per hire
metrics.description: Target: fewer rounds needed with structured evidence

metrics.label: Shortlist → hire rate
metrics.description: Target: better conversion through calibrated evaluation

target.label: Who it's for
target.title: Built for product teams hiring for production.

pilot.label: Pilot offer
pilot.title: 4-week pilot — on a real role.
pilot.description: Test the proof-first approach with measurable before/after results.

items.question: Is this a take-home test?
items.answer: No. The work sample takes ≤60 minutes total, is chunkable into shorter sessions, and runs in a neutral environment (no complex setup).

items.question: Do you auto-reject candidates?
items.answer: No. AI structures evidence and highlights uncertainty areas, but the final decision is always made by a human with full oversight.

items.question: How do you handle GDPR?
items.answer: Explicit consent, time-limited retention, full audit trail, EU hosting, and complete data control for candidates.

items.question: What if a candidate has no GitHub?
items.answer: Evidence can come from work sample + structured explanations. GitHub is a plus, not a requirement. We evaluate capability, not social profile.

items.question: Does it replace our ATS?
items.answer: No. Baara Proof starts as a decision module that integrates with your process. No complex migration, no system replacement.

items.question: What's the ROI?
items.answer: Measurable from the pilot: before/after KPIs on time-to-shortlist, interviews per hire, shortlist→hire rate, and HM satisfaction.
